name: Bread Pudding with Strawberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: French bread - sliced 1/2-inch thick (preferably day old)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place one layer of sliced French bread in the bottom of a greased 9-inch cake pan.
3. Sprinkle with half of the currants.
4. Place another layer of bread on top and sprinkle with the remaining currants.
5. Mix together the eggs, sugar, milk, margarine, vanilla, and nutmeg.
6. Pour gently over the bread and currants, ensuring all the top layer is saturated.
7. Cover and refrigerate at least 8 hours.
8. Bake uncovered in the preheated oven until the custard is set and the top is lightly browned, about 45 minutes.
9. Cut into servings and top with strawberry sauce.
Strawberry Sauce:
1. Place strawberries (fresh or thawed frozen) in a saucepan.
2. Add orange juice and lemon juice, cooking on low until softened.
3. Puree one-third of the mixture and return to the whole.
4. Combine sugar with cornstarch and add to the strawberries.
5. Cook, stirring, until slightly thickened.
